body: A user has joined a channel. The actor parameter describes the user who joined the channel and the entity describes the channel. If the user was invited to the channel, the inviter will appear in the details parameter and the context parameter will be that of the inviter. The user field in this action contains a team identifier so that you can see which team the joining user comes from (useful for externally shared channels).
